pi_items.source: Common French surname, verified as real name format
Common French given name, verified as real name format

Official Lyon municipality street directory (annuaire-mairie.fr) lists all 9 avenues in 69003 arrondissement; 'Avenue des Champs' not found. Listed avenues: Avenue des Acacias, Avenue du Château, Avenue du Maréchal de Saxe, Avenue Esquirol, Avenue Felix Faure, Avenue Georges Pompidou, Avenue Jules Jusserand, Avenue Lacassagne, Avenue Rockefeller. The only 'Avenue des Champs' in France is Champs-Élysées in Paris.
Verified via postal-codes.cybo.com and worldpostalcodes.org - 69003 is the valid postal code for Lyon's 3rd arrondissement (3ème Arrondissement)
Real city in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region, France. Verified via multiple sources including visiterlyon.com
Verified as valid French landline format. Area code 04 is for southeastern France; 04 72 is specifically Lyon, Rhône (69) area code per areacodebase.com. Phone number follows correct 10-digit format.
Verified via postal-codes.cybo.com and postalpinzipcodes.com - 75002 is the valid postal code for Paris's 2nd arrondissement (Paris 02)
Real city in Île-de-France region, France, well-documented across all sources

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic test data for a medical records system (MedinTux). Most metadata is verified as correct: patient name 'Hélène MARTINEAU' uses real French naming conventions; postal code 69003 correctly identifies Lyon's 3rd arrondissement; postal code 75002 correctly identifies Paris's 2nd arrondissement; phone number 04 72 33 45 67 is a valid Lyon-area landline. However, the expected address '8 Avenue des Champs' does not exist in Lyon 69003—the official Lyon municipality directory lists only 9 avenues in that arrondissement, none named 'Avenue des Champs'. This address appears to be fabricated or incorrect for testing purposes.
